message:
fix(sw): prevent stale JS caching causing scroll/blur bugs

- Remove StaleWhileRevalidate for JS/CSS - precache handles versioned assets
- Bump all cache names to v2 to force cache refresh
- Add explicit cleanup of v1 caches on activation
- Add skipWaiting() on install for immediate updates

The StaleWhileRevalidate strategy was serving cached JavaScript from
before the OffscreenCanvas worker renderer was disabled, causing users
to experience scroll and blur issues that were already fixed.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
